deep_dive.title: EMBRACE: A Multi-task Framework for Comprehensive Quality Assessment in Cleavage-stage Embryo
deep_dive.abstract: Cleavage-stage embryo assessment in in vitro fertilization requires the integrated interpretation of cytoplasmic fragmentation, developmental stage, and blastomere symmetry. However, conventional visual assessment is affected by observer variability, particularly when fragmented regions are small, irregular, or low contrast. This study presents EMBRACE, a multi-task deep learning framework for jointly performing cytoplasmic-fragmentation segmentation, t2/t4 developmental-stage classification, and blastomere-symmetry grading from static cleavage-stage embryo microscopy images. EMBRACE combines a shared ResNet-50 backbone, a concatenation-based multi-scale feature-fusion (C-MSFF) module, a U-Net-style segmentation decoder, and two task-specific classification heads. After predefined inclusion and exclusion criteria, 9,137 annotated embryo images were divided into 7,309 training, 914 validation, and 914 held-out test images. On the held-out test set, EMBRACE achieved a Dice coefficient of 0.781 and an intersection over union of 0.677 for fragmentation segmentation. Developmental-stage classification achieved an accuracy of 0.995, macro-F1 of 0.994, and AUC of 1.000. Blastomere-symmetry grading achieved a balanced accuracy of 0.901, macro-F1 of 0.907, and quadratic weighted kappa of 0.859. These findings support the feasibility of combining spatially inspectable fragmentation localization with embryo-level morphology assessment in a single framework. External and prospective validation is required before clinical deployment.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: multi-task framework for comprehensive quality assessment of embryo images
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于胚胎图像综合质量评估的多任务框架
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于胚胎图像综合质量评估的多任务框架
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于胚胎图像综合质量评估的多任务框架
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Develops EMBRACE, a multi-task deep learning model for assessing cleavage-stage embryo quality by jointly segmenting fragmentation, classifying stage, and grading symmetry from microscopy images.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对体外受精中卵裂期胚胎质量评估的观察者差异问题，提出EMBRACE多任务深度学习框架。该框架结合共享ResNet-50骨干、多尺度特征融合模块和解码器，同步进行细胞质碎片分割、发育阶段分类和卵裂球对称性分级。从静态显微镜图像中全面评估胚胎质量，克服了低对比度不规则碎片的检测困难，提高了评估的客观性与可重复性，有望辅助生殖决策。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对体外受精中卵裂期胚胎质量评估的观察者差异问题，提出EMBRACE多任务深度学习框架。该框架结合共享ResNet-50骨干、多尺度特征融合模块和解码器，同步进行细胞质碎片分割、发育阶段分类和卵裂球对称性分级。从静态显微镜图像中全面评估胚胎质量，克服了低对比度不规则碎片的检测困难，提高了评估的客观性与可重复性，有望辅助生殖决策。
